# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe what this pull request changes.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] New accessibility rule
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Test
- [ ] Refactor

## Checklist

- [ ] I have tested the change locally.
- [ ] I have added or updated tests.
- [ ] I have updated documentation if needed.
- [ ] I have added examples if this introduces a new rule.
- [ ] My change avoids unnecessary false positives.

## Screenshots

Add screenshots if this changes diagnostics, quick fixes, or developer experience.

## Related Issue

Closes #
